page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web based platform for comparative analyses of human miRNA functions. It includes two programs: miRmut2GO (Functional analysis of genetic and somatic mutations in microRNAs) and miRpair2GO (Comparative functional analysis for microRNA pairs).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web based platform for comparative analyses of human miRNA functions. It includes two programs: miRmut2GO (Functional analysis of genetic and somatic mutations in microRNAs) and miRpair2GO (Comparative functional analysis for microRNA pairs).
